历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province were approximately 13388, 12840, 12569, 10251, and 12510 respectively. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform (physics category), the ranking significantly advanced to 10251, rebounding to 12510 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12510. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) at this university in Heilongjiang Province: 38 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 42 in 2024, and 42 in 2025, showing a trend of gradual expansion. The 2026 plan increases to 45, an expansion of 3 (about 7.1%) compared to 2025. The increase in enrollment slots slightly intensifies competition, putting pressure on rankings to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Geosciences (Wuhan) is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 56th (54th in 2025, 61st in 2024), stable within the top 60 nationally, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. The university's reputation evaluation has been stable in recent years, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin (TikTok) does not enter the top 100, indicating average exposure on short video platforms. There are no records of historical admission anomalies for this university, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable. Fifth; the university has traditional strengths in geology, geological resources and geological engineering, geophysics, etc., with strong influence in related industries.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social heat. The university enrolls students in these fields, attracting high-scoring candidates. Traditional geology and materials majors have average social heat. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is about 114,000, a decrease of about 2.9% from 2025, slightly alleviating competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, accounting for about 2%-3% of Heilongjiang's enrollment, a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment. In recent years, the number of enrolled students from Heilongjiang has been stable between 38 and 45, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12510, the 2026 expansion of about 7.1% (pressure to move ranking backward by about 536 places), and the decrease in physics category examinees in the province by about 2.9% (slight relief in competition), the expansion effect slightly outweighs the reduction in examinees. However, the 2025 ranking has already rebounded significantly from 2024. It is predicted that the 2026 ranking will continue to move slightly backward due to expansion. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 12996, with a range of 12496 to 13496.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (12496–13496), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<12496), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>13496), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings. This university is a 211 institution with high overall cost-effectiveness, suitable for candidates interested in geosciences, resources, and the environment.
